Select Page

Embark on your journey with mentors and opportunities right at your fingertips

uEmbark is a community-founded organization that connects you with young professionals to answer any question you have along your journey. We strive to connect you with a vast network of resources and development opportunities, all in one easy-to-access place.

Join Today

What can we do for you?

Learn more about the benefits of joining our online community

uEmbark was founded on the idea that all adolescents should have a mentor to reach out to throughout their lives, whether the questions are large or small. We have expanded our focus to provide and consolidate financial resources and development opportunities into one accessible community.

Our mission

Scholarships

We provide you access to our database of local and national scholarships, geared to provide the financial assistance you might need in pursuing education.

Mentor Helpline

We are a community of young professionals, from a variety of backgrounds and career paths, ready to answer whatever questions you might have about your future.

Opportunities

By working with organizations across the state, we have created a database of development opportunities to slingshot your career into action

Real-time Updates

Our team strives to explore the latest developments that might be helpful to you and your career. Check back often or sign up for our email list to get the latest updates.

Joining our community is simple

With just a few clicks and some personal information, you will be given immediate access to our expansive network of resources. We continue to update our community with the latest updates and developments to propel your career into action.

Get Started

FAQ

If you have any other questions or would just like to say hi, please reach out below!

Please allow 24 hours for our support team to respond to your questions or messages.

Contact Us


Is uEmbark free to use?

Yes! uEmbark is 100% free to use. We are glad to help you along your journey, any step of the way. 



Who are the "mentors"?

Our mentors are made of of a team of young professionals who live right here in Massachusetts. We are glad to share our experiences or help answer any questions you have. Login to see our mentor directory and connect 1-on-1 with a  mentor of your choice.



Can I join the uEmbark team?

Our team is constantly expanding to help provide the best support possible to our users. Please fill out an application if you would like to become part of our family today!

Mentor Application

Ready to get started?

Get in touch, or create an account

Create Account
